widget_key_with_state.code:
# Automatically sync widget to session state using key
st.slider('Value', 0, 100, key='my_slider')

# Access via session state
st.write(f'Slider value: {st.session_state.my_slider}')

# Programmatically set value
if st.button('Reset'):
    st.session_state.my_slider = 50
    st.rerun()
widget_key_with_state.description: Widget keys auto-sync to session state
